insight: In Galvani Drone + Zemora Voidbringer sets, P1 opening 1 Conduit (11C) to accelerate Zemora deployment felt poor in practice according to amalloy's testing, suggesting standard economy openings may still be preferable even when racing for Zemora.
author: amalloy
context: amalloy reported testing the 11C opener specifically in Galvani+Zemora sets and found it felt awful.
